ListItem.Para: Flight deck to cabin communication operates normally.
Alternate procedures are established and used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Use headsets in conjunction with an audio control panel and the centre TCP to communicate with the cabin through the cabin interphone system.

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.

ListItem.Para: At least 50% of cabin handsets operate normally.
One handset must operate normally at each pair of exit doors.
Alternate communications procedures between the affected flight attendant’s station(s) are established and used.

Note.Para: An operative handset at an inoperative flight attendant seat shall not be counted to satisfy the 50% requirement.
Any handset functions that operate normally may be used.

OperationProcedure.Para: Prior to flight, pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members on the inoperative cabin interphone handset system. Communications procedures between the affected flight attendants station(s) may include relay of message through the nearest operative handsets, the use of hand signals and voice as appropriate.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided alternate procedures are established and used.

Note.Para: There are 3 interphone handset in OFCR and 01 interphone handset in OFAR.
Any handset functions that operate normally may be used.

ListItem.Para: Prior to flight, pilot-in-command must brief cabin crew members on the inoperative OFCR/OFAR cabin interphone handset system and chime or PA systems is used to call the flight crew in OFCR/OFAR.
Use the nearest station that operates normally ,and
In the event that urgent or emergency call is required, use the PA system.
